title: Refactor ISP-006 (ISP): Implementation forced to throw UnsupportedOperationException for a method it...
apply_error: no patch blocks produced by LLM

detected_issue.description: Implementation forced to throw UnsupportedOperationException for a method it cannot support.
detected_issue.reasoning: Similar to UTF8JsonGenerator, this class is forced to implement a method from the fat JsonGenerator interface that it cannot support, violating ISP.

fix_logic.summary: Remove unsupported UTF8 string writing methods from WriterBasedJsonGenerator
fix_logic.rationale: WriterBasedJsonGenerator is designed for character-based output (Writer). Implementing UTF8-specific methods that throw UnsupportedOperationException violates the Interface Segregation Principle. These methods should be removed as they are not applicable to this implementation.
